content:
1 min read
1 hour ago

--

Ever happened that you are traveling and you don’t know where you are standing. Which street is this, which area is this? Usually it happens in trains or buses, family or relatives ask about where you are but you don’t know the location.
For this, I have made a location tracking app. It fetches the person’s location and tells and exact coordinates (latitudes and longitudes), street, area, district, state with pincode. You can see yourself in Google Maps too. It is purely made by HTML, CSS and JAVASCRIPT. It uses the free geolocation api for coordinates, and further these coordinates are sent to nominatin Api to fetch your location. Also, coordinates are sended to Google Maps for realistic map view.
It was quite easier for me to make this site. Using DOM concepts in real life, fetching API’s collects all the concepts i learnt. I learned several new things, like to directly pass the coordinates as input in Google Maps instead of using thier API.
In future, I will connect this site with database for more security and advanced features.
Working on javascript it was so fascinating to make sites by own.
